reviews.comment:
Llevo media hora bajo el sol y no atienden di en cambio de turno. Son lo peor

(Translated by Google)
I've been standing in the sun for half an hour and they're not helping me, even though I'm changing shifts. They're the worst.

reviewReply.comment: Tratando el tema para minimizar cierre turno. Disculpe molestias.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxdllHaTJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Otra vez la misma avivada. Te cobran 55 l de combustible cuando tu tanque tiene 50 litros. Solo podes darte cuenta si llenas el tanque y te queda poco en el depósito. Estamos a merced de esta gente q comercia robando a sus clientes.

(Translated by Google)
The same scam again. They charge you for 55 liters of fuel when your tank only holds 50 liters. You only realize it if you fill the tank and there's hardly any fuel left. We're at the mercy of these people who make a living by robbing their customers.

reviewReply.comment: Buem dia . Controles vulometricos periodicos . Y controlados por secretaria de energia .

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxc2FEWThnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cumple perfectamente con su función, la de permitir pasar una noche de descanso para seguir viaje. Lástima que no tenga restaurante. Punto medio entre nuestro origen y destino. Volveríamos por acá.

(Translated by Google)
It perfectly fulfills its purpose, allowing us to spend a restful night before continuing our journey. It's a shame it doesn't have a restaurant. A good midpoint between our origin and destination. We would definitely return.
